subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is verily the Breaker of idols and the Dispeller of vain imaginings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه لکاسر الاصنام و ممحی الاوهام و
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @unity; oneness of humanity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
